included: typed native list operation item storage
JSON adapter coercion as a boundary concern
empty list operation from authored None
prepend, append, and delete item lists
last-one-wins behavior for repeated authored subfields
specialized Reference and Payload item storage as native composition-arc records
foundational item validation for token, string, int, int64, uint, and uint64
deferred: USDA text syntax parsing, owned by USDA parser skills

element_types.Reference: native reference arc record with optional asset reference, optional prim path handle, layer offset, and scale
element_types.Payload: native payload arc record with optional asset reference, optional prim path handle, layer offset, and scale

core_model.storage_rule: Core authored listOps store typed native items, not parsed JSON strings. Strings are the native item type only for listOp<string>. listOp<Reference> and listOp<Payload> items must be native arc records, not dictionaries, bare asset strings, or path strings.
core_model.json_rule: Tagged JSON is materialized on demand for adapter/dump output and is not durable listOp storage.
core_model.syntax_rule: USDA text syntax and JSON test input coercion are boundary adapter concerns, not part of the core authored listOp value model.

input.elementType: ObjectPath, Reference, Payload, token, string, int, int64, uint, or uint64
ObjectPath, Reference, Payload, token, string, int, int64, uint, or uint64
ObjectPath, Reference, Payload, token, string, int, int64, uint, or uint64

output.value: canonical tagged listOp with explicit items

input.elementType: ObjectPath, Reference, Payload, token, string, int, int64, uint, or uint64
input.edits: array of objects with field in explicit/prepend/append/delete and items array

output.value: canonical tagged listOp after applying authored subfields in order

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with an ops array. The JSON adapter coerces JSON strings/numbers into typed native listOp items before calling the core model. For Reference and Payload elements, JSON objects are adapter input only and must be converted into native composition-arc records before entering the core listOp model.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results. Each operation reports ok false with a diagnostic for local validation failures.
